chapter_title.ar: باب الْجَبَائِرِ وَ الْقُرُوحِ وَ الْجِرَاحَاتِ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 21 – The splints, and the sores, and the wounds

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: صحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (3/108)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: صحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (3/108)
text: سَأَلْتُهُ عَنِ الْجُرْحِ كَيْفَ يَصْنَعُ بِهِ صَاحِبُهُ قَالَ يَغْسِلُ مَا حَوْلَهُ .

en.hubeali: Ali Bin Ibrahim, from Muhammad Bin Isa, from Yunus, from Abdullah Bin Sinan,
(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullahasws, said, ‘I asked himasws about the wound, ‘How should one deal with it (for the Ablution (Wudhu))?’ Heasws said: ‘He should wash what is around it’.
en.sarwar: 2. Ali ibn Ibrahim has narrated from Muhammad ibn ‘Isa from Yunus from’Abd Allah ibn Sinan who has said the following: “I once asked abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, about how one should take Wudu’ with a wound. He (the Imam) said, ‘He must wash the area around it.’”
